_comment: Human-curated overlay for the baked multi-language Pokemon set index (scripts/build-pokemon-intl-sets.mjs -> data/pokemon-intl-sets.json). Keyed by language then UPPERCASED printed set code. Two jobs: (1) ENRICH a set TCGdex already carries with an English display name (name_en, so English-name search works) and its nullable English-equivalent set (enEquivalent, N:1 and often absent); (2) INJECT a brand-new set TCGdex has not ingested yet (supply name_native + serie + releaseDate so it appears until the API catches up, then the API record is merged over it). Add rows here as new JP/CN/KO sets drop or when you confirm an English mapping. name_en is the set's own English rendering (e.g. Abyss Eye), NOT the enEquivalent English set (e.g. Pitch Black) - both are searchable. enEquivalent.id is a pokemontcg.io set id, used only for a last-resort fallback image; leave blank if unknown.

M5.serie: ポケモンカードゲーム MEGA
